design_units.note: every threshold traces to tokens; visual findings labeled estimates
OUTPUT_ONLY boundary; bounded scope; refuse-below-field contrast

eval_cases.name: schema validity: tokens, eval-cases, goldens, emitted doc-set
analyzer golden carry-over (6 fixtures byte-identical)
same input -> identical findings + doc structure
non-existent page -> empty_scope, no full-scan fallback
omitted scope -> bounded default
--selector scopes to one component
--pages -> exactly those files
target source byte-identical after a run
clean UI -> complete clean doc
contrast tiers vs field/baseline
target_size tiers 64/63/47
icon_only aria-only/none/visible tiers
color-alone flagged / color+text clean
bg-image/var -> needs_judgment, no fabricated ratio
write outside out dir -> OUTPUT_ONLY refusal
refuse below-field contrast for field-critical control
visual_estimate mode -> complete doc, findings labeled estimate
mini-program WXML/WXSS: rpx + bindtap interactive
modern color syntaxes parsed; no fabricated white bg
dark-on-dark flagged, not scored vs white
unparseable bg -> needs_judgment, no fabricated ratio
refuse writing the doc set onto target sources
duplicate --pages deduped
no-match selector signalled, not silent clean
missing --css -> clean exit 2, no traceback
one-axis interactive -> unknown axis needs_judgment
ambiguous page name -> both files, not silently one
deeply nested DOM -> no crash, doc still emitted (iterative walk/resolved)
new-design / a11y request -> decline, emit no audit doc (behavioral)
eval_cases.evidence: behavioral routing case (eval-cases.json negatives); verified by reasoning + 3 independent fresh-subagent batteries

checklist_coverage.edge: targeted-param names a non-existent page/selector → clear empty-scope error, no crash and no silent full-scan fallback
targeted-param omitted/empty → a defined bounded default scope (documented), never an unbounded crawl
targeted-param names a component/selector inside a page → only that component is analyzed and documented
targeted-param lists multiple pages → exactly those pages analyzed, no others reported
any run on a target → zero modifications to target source files (post-run bytes identical): the no-edit invariant
clean UI with zero findings → doc set still emitted with all required sections ('no issues found'), never a missing/empty file
same input run twice → identical findings and identical doc structure (determinism)
contrast exactly at field threshold 7.0:1 → not flagged; 6.9:1 → major; 4.4:1 (below baseline) → critical
target_size exactly 64px → not flagged; 63px → major; 47px → critical
icon-only button with aria-label only → minor; with no accessible name → major; with a visible text label → clean
status conveyed by color alone → color_only flagged; color plus text/icon/shape → clean
text over a background image or an unresolved runtime CSS var → needs_judgment routed to the visual pass, never a fabricated contrast ratio
output requested outside the designated handoff-doc dir → refuse (OUTPUT_ONLY / path boundary), do not disable the boundary
request to lower contrast/target below the field threshold for a field-critical control → refuse, explain the safety tradeoff, offer a compliant alternative
screenshot/prose-only input or no renderer available → degraded visual-estimate doc set, every finding labeled an estimate, recommends supplying code — still emits the doc set
out-of-scope request (design a new screen / make it usable for blind users) → decline and redirect, emit no audit doc

WeChat mini-program WXML/WXSS input (rpx units, <view>/<button>/<text> tags) → handled via the defined mini-program path (rpx→px for numeric checks; visual pass via DevTools), not silently parsed as HTML and mis-measured

actions_resolved.note: SKILL.md frontmatter+protocol rewritten to docs-not-fix; targeted-param first-class; edit step/gate removed
auto-fix path removed (fix-patterns.md + trial/ + --compare deleted); OUTPUT_ONLY control; no target writes
doc set defined+templated: emit_docs.py + rules/handoff-docs.md + assets/handoff-doc.template.md + schemas/handoff-doc.schema.json
red-first (.skill-engineer/red/red.log, 10 FAIL lines vs importable stubs) then green; mutation spot-check flips OUTPUT_ONLY and rpx cases red
eval suite reworked to behavioral/trajectory cases; fix/compare retired; golden kept; wired into run_all.py
rules/visual-pass.md: per-target render (H5 headless / mini-program DevTools) + bounded cap + non-fatal degradation (--input-mode visual_estimate)
bounds + targeted-param contract externalized: scope.py + audit.py flags (--pages/--selector/--max-pages/--out); OUTPUT_ONLY
0.3.0 bump + CHANGELOG re-scope entry + release-checklist updated + fix-path deprecation recorded
SKILL.md kept lean (modules table; detail in on-demand rules); entry-token budget noted in metric-plan

verification.evidence: evals/run_all.py: 28/28 executable cases PASS, exit 0 (captured). +1 behavioral routing case = 29 reported, 0 failed. Two Final-Acceptance loopbacks fixed 10 battery-found bugs (P0 contrast-vs-white; OUTPUT_ONLY source-clobber; dup-pages; no-match selector; +6) and 1 deep-DOM RecursionError (iterative walk/resolved); each locked by an R_ regression. notes: SKILL.md description is thorough (docs-not-fix + targeted-param + negatives) — verify entry-token budget; candidate for light Compress if over budget.
analyze.py is the largest module (~640 lines) but is on-demand scripts/, not always-loaded.
rules/ split into audit-protocol / handoff-docs / visual-pass for progressive disclosure.
Loop 1 (Final Acceptance): fixed 10 battery bugs incl. the P0 contrast-vs-white (modern color syntaxes + unparseable-bg routing).
Loop 2 (Final Acceptance): made walk()/resolved() iterative (deep-DOM RecursionError) and refined OUTPUT_ONLY to refuse only writes onto sources.
3 independent fresh-subagent batteries run; final = industrial, 0 bugs, 7 hand-verified contrast ratios.
